features: Carex Dermacare Original Antibacterial Hand Wash: With natural moisturisers that help leave hands feeling soft and smooth, the Dermacare liquid hand soap enhances the skin's natural pH and gently cleanses while removing dirt and germs

Kills 99.9 Percent of Bacteria: Carex experts have taken care to develop a formula for Carex liquid soap hand wash that works quickly and kills 99.9 Percent of bacteria, helping you and your family to have protected hands faster

Added Moisturisers: Suitable for the whole family, the Carex Original antibacterial hand soap is effective yet gentle in helping to prevent the spread of germs when washing hands, helping to leave hands feeling soft and hygienically clean

Packaging May Vary: Due to huge demand and a pump shortage at the moment, Carex hand wash may arrive as a refill format without a pump. We’d like to encourage you to save your previous hand wash pump and reuse this with your refill pack

The Dermacare Range: The Carex Dermacare liquid hand wash range is designed to clean, care and protect hands whatever the occasion. Whether you're cooking for your family or you've returned from a hike, Carex know you'll want to protect your hands
description: Product Description Introducing Carex Hand Wash, the UK's NO.1 Hand Wash brand, dedicated to keeping hands healthy for over 25 years. Our expertly formulated handwash provides unbeatable antibacterial power and care for your skin. Roll up your sleeves and grab life with both hands, knowing that Carex has been protecting families for decades. Join millions of satisfied customers and experience the difference with Carex Hand Wash.​ Why Choose Carex Hand Wash?​ •Kills 99.9 percent of bacteria: Our powerful formula removes dirt and germs and ensures thorough antibacterial protection, giving you peace of mind with every wash.​ •Good hygiene made easy: We believe in the importance of practicing good hygiene, and our liquid hand wash makes this a breeze.​ •Preserves skin's defences: Enjoy the benefits of our innovative formula that keeps your skin's natural antibacterial defences intact for up to 2 hours after washing. *Always practice good hygiene​ •Gentle on hands: Experience the perfect balance of effectiveness and care as our liquid soap leaves your hands feeling soft, smooth, and revitalized.​ •Vegan-Approved: Our hand wash is proudly vegan, so you can prioritize your health, the health of your hands, and the well-being of animals.​ •Eco-friendly packaging: Join us in our mission for a sustainable future with our 100% recyclable eco bottle. *Remove pump when recycling.​ At Carex, we genuinely CAREX about your well-being, your hands, and the environment. Our hand soap is a trusted household staple that millions of satisfied customers rely on every day. It's time for you to join the Carex family and discover the ultimate hand hygiene solution so that you can live life hands on! #Life’sAHandful Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, and Glycerin, along with Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, CI 42051 Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately. Protects the skin's natural antibacterial defences up to 2 hours after washing. Always practice good hand hygiene. Box Contains 6 x Carex Liquid Soap Original 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
